# Cosmic Igloo

> Cosmic Igloo is a premium made-to-order yoga mat brand based in Perth, Australia. Each mat features original sacred-geometry and cosmic artwork, custom-designed and printed to order for serious yoga practitioners and wellness buyers. It is a premium wellness product brand — not a developer tool, code repository, or software project.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Shop the collection of made-to-order yoga mats.
- [About](/about): Our story, materials, and how each mat is made.
- [How it works](/#how-it-works): The process from order to delivery.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions about mats, shipping, and care.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Delivery times and regions.
- [Refund & Returns](/refund-policy): Policy for made-to-order items.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories from yogis in our community.

## Blog

- [Hudson in South West Australia](/blog/hudson-in-margaret-river): A yogi's slow travel through Margaret River.
